page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance configured with 24 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 24 physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8469C processor running at 2.6 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance features a single-threaded core configuration with one thread per core. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 5.33 GB of RAM per core.

A primary feature of this instance is the integration of a single hardware GPU equipped with 96 GB of VRAM, making it suitable for memory-intensive acceleration tasks. However, the instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring users to provision external block storage for operating systems and data. Additionally, network connectivity is rated at a 15 Gbps baseline bandwidth, and the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the high ratio of GPU VRAM relative to the system memory, this instance is optimized for workloads requiring substantial graphics memory, such as large language model inference, deep learning training, and complex parallel computing tasks. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation and high-capacity GPU VRAM provide a dense resource profile for specialized acceleration, though the lack of bundled local storage requires careful architecture planning to manage external storage costs.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 24 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8469C processor operating at 2.6 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, the instance provides 24 physical cores with a single thread per core and 128.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by a single GPU with 96 GB of VRAM, designed for memory-intensive parallel computing. Tradeoffs include the complete absence of local storage, requiring external block storage volumes, and zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Network performance is anchored by a 15 Gbps baseline bandwidth. This hardware profile is engineered for workloads such as machine learning inference, data science, and parallel processing tasks where massive GPU memory is critical, offering a specialized resource density that balances dedicated compute cores with high-capacity graphics memory.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.6xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a 96 GB VRAM GPU, optimized for parallel computing and machine learning workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn8v.6xlarge features 24 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and a 96 GB VRAM GPU for accelerated parallel workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring dedicated Intel cores and high-capacity graphics memory for parallel computing and machine learning workloads.

Single GPU accelerator equipped with 96 GB of dedicated VRAM.
128.0 GB of system memory providing 5.33 GB of RAM per core.
15 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for data transfer.
No local storage included, requiring external block storage provisioning.
Well-suited for machine learning inference and parallel computing tasks.
